word: G4821 - συμβασιλεύω - symbasileúō - soom-bas-il-yoo'-o - Reign with

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συμβασιλεύω

- Transliteration: Sumbasileuo

- Phonetic: soom-bas-il-yoo'-o

- Definition:

1. to reign together

2. metaph. to possess supreme honour, liberty, blessedness, with one in the kingdom of God

- Origin: from G4862 and G936

- TDNT entry: 1:591 & 7:787,1102

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and G936; to be co-regent (figuratively): - reign with.
